2026-04-13T23:02:40.2029875Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2030598Z ---
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2031041Z description: |
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2031592Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2032484Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2033462Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2034014Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2034201Z on:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2034580Z   push:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2034981Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2035429Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2035711Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2035926Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2036220Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2036424Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2036703Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2036901Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2037356Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2037861Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2038268Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2038657Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2039067Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2039836Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2040427Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2041548Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2042308Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2042766Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2043213Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2043738Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2044148Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2044551Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2044938Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2045316Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2045840Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2046322Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2046913Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2047621Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2047974Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2048470Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2049104Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2050048Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2050686Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2051069Z               }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2051272Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2051733Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2052454Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2052948Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2053391Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2054219Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2055108Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2055991Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2056590Z               }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2056801Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2057217Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2057807Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2058270Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2058804Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2059492Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2060011Z               });

2026-04-13T23:02:40.2161112Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2161369Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2161545Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2161808Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2161977Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2162200Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2162362Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2162771Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2163248Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2163615Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2163970Z   noop:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2164355Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2164784Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2165135Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2165756Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2166505Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2166960Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2167417Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2167919Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2168311Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2168706Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2169114Z       steps:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2192036Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2192606Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2193090Z           env:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2193694Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2194395Z           with:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2194768Z             script: |
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2195302Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2195952Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2196625Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2197452Z                 return;
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2197838Z               }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2198048Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2211440Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2212332Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2215331Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2215824Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2216689Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2217537Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2218635Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2219560Z               }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2219799Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2220078Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2220687Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2221149Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2221688Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2222167Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2222676Z               });
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2223160Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2223606Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2223752Z tools:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2224093Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2224442Z   github:
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2224805Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2225092Z 
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2225264Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2225853Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2226559Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T23:02:40.2237061Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
